en: Then all the congregation raised a loud cry, and the people wept that night.
zh: 當時，全體會眾大聲喧嚷；那夜眾民都哭號。

en: And all the people of Israel grumbled against Moses and Aaron. The whole congregation said to them, "Would that we had died in the land of Egypt! Or would that we had died in this wilderness!
zh: 以色列人向摩西和亞倫發怨言；全體會眾都對他們說：“但願我們早死在埃及地，或死在這曠野。

en: Why is the LORD bringing us into this land, to fall by the sword? Our wives and our little ones will become a prey. Would it not be better for us to go back to Egypt?"
zh: 耶和華為甚麼把我們領到這地來，死在刀劍之下呢？我們的妻子和孩子要被擄掠。我們回埃及去，豈不更好嗎？”

en: And they said to one another, "Let us choose a leader and go back to Egypt."
zh: 於是他們彼此說：“我們另立一個首領，回埃及去吧。”

en: Then Moses and Aaron fell on their faces before all the assembly of the congregation of the people of Israel.
zh: 摩西和亞倫就俯伏在以色列全體會眾面前。

en: And Joshua the son of Nun and Caleb the son of Jephunneh, who were among those who had spied out the land, tore their clothes
zh: 窺探那地的人中，有嫩的兒子約書亞和耶孚尼的兒子迦勒；他們撕裂衣服，

en: and said to all the congregation of the people of Israel, "The land, which we passed through to spy it out, is an exceedingly good land.
zh: 對以色列全體會眾說：“我們去窺探的那地，是十分美好的地方。

en: If the LORD delights in us, he will bring us into this land and give it to us, a land that flows with milk and honey.
zh: 耶和華若是喜悅我們，就必把我們領進那地，把那地賜給我們，那地原是流奶與蜜的地。

en: Only do not rebel against the LORD. And do not fear the people of the land, for they are bread for us. Their protection is removed from them, and the LORD is with us; do not fear them."
zh: 只要你們不背叛耶和華，就不必怕那地的人，因為他們是我們的食物；蔭庇他們的，已經離開他們了，耶和華卻與我們同在；不要怕他們。”

en: Then all the congregation said to stone them with stones. But the glory of the LORD appeared at the tent of meeting to all the people of Israel.
zh: 全體會眾都說要用石頭打死他們二人。這時，耶和華的榮光在會幕中向以色列眾人顯現。

en: And the LORD said to Moses, "How long will this people despise me? And how long will they not believe in me, in spite of all the signs that I have done among them?
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“這民藐視我要到幾時呢？我雖然在他們中間行了這些神蹟，他們還是不信我要到幾時呢？

en: I will strike them with the pestilence and disinherit them, and I will make of you a nation greater and mightier than they."
zh: 我要用瘟疫擊殺他們，除滅他們；我要使你成為大國，比他們還強。”

en: But Moses said to the LORD, "Then the Egyptians will hear of it, for you brought up this people in your might from among them,
zh: 摩西對耶和華說：“這樣埃及人必聽見這事，因為你曾用大能，把這民從他們中間領上來；

en: and they will tell the inhabitants of this land. They have heard that you, O LORD, are in the midst of this people. For you, O LORD, are seen face to face, and your cloud stands over them and you go before them, in a pillar of cloud by day and in a pillar of fire by night.
zh: 埃及人也必告訴那地的居民。那地的居民也曾聽見你耶和華是在這人民中間，你耶和華曾面對面的向人顯現，你的雲彩常停在他們上面；日間你在雲柱中，夜間你在火柱中，走在他們前面。

en: Now if you kill this people as one man, then the nations who have heard your fame will say,
zh: 現在如果你把這人民殺死，像殺死一人，那些聽見你名聲的萬國就必議論說：

en: 'It is because the LORD was not able to bring this people into the land that he swore to give to them that he has killed them in the wilderness.'
zh: ‘因為耶和華不能把這民領進他向他們起誓應許的地，所以在曠野把他們殺了。’

en: And now, please let the power of the Lord be great as you have promised, saying,
zh: 現在求主大發能力，照著你說過的話：

en: 'The LORD is slow to anger and abounding in steadfast love, forgiving iniquity and transgression, but he will by no means clear the guilty, visiting the iniquity of the fathers on the children, to the third and the fourth generation.'
zh: ‘耶和華不輕易發怒，且有豐盛的慈愛；他赦免罪孽和過犯；絕不以有罪的為無罪，必追討罪孽，自父到子，直到三四代。’

en: Please pardon the iniquity of this people, according to the greatness of your steadfast love, just as you have forgiven this people, from Egypt until now."
zh: 求你照著你的大慈愛，饒恕這人民的罪孽，好像你從埃及直到現在，常赦免這人民一樣。”

en: Then the LORD said, "I have pardoned, according to your word.
zh: 耶和華說：“我就照著你的話，赦免他們；

en: But truly, as I live, and as all the earth shall be filled with the glory of the LORD,
zh: 但是，我指著我的永生起誓，全地要被耶和華的榮耀充滿。

en: none of the men who have seen my glory and my signs that I did in Egypt and in the wilderness, and yet have put me to the test these ten times and have not obeyed my voice,
zh: 這些見過我的榮耀，和我在埃及與曠野所行的神蹟的人，仍然試探了我這十次，不聽從我的話；

en: shall see the land that I swore to give to their fathers. And none of those who despised me shall see it.
zh: 他們決不得看見我向他們的祖宗起誓應許之地；藐視我的，一個也不能看見那地。

en: But my servant Caleb, because he has a different spirit and has followed me fully, I will bring into the land into which he went, and his descendants shall possess it.
zh: 但是我的僕人迦勒，因他另有一個心志，專心跟從我，我必把他領進他去過的那地；他的子孫也必得著那地為業。

en: Now, since the Amalekites and the Canaanites dwell in the valleys, turn tomorrow and set out for the wilderness by the way to the Red Sea."
zh: 現在亞瑪力人和迦南人住在山谷中，明天你們要回轉，從到紅海路上，起行到曠野去。”

en: And the LORD spoke to Moses and to Aaron, saying,
zh: 耶和華吩咐摩西和亞倫說：

en: "How long shall this wicked congregation grumble against me? I have heard the grumblings of the people of Israel, which they grumble against me.
zh: “這惡會眾向我發怨言要到幾時呢？以色列人向我所發的怨言，我都聽見了。

en: Say to them, 'As I live, declares the LORD, what you have said in my hearing I will do to you:
zh: 你要對他們說：‘耶和華說，我指著我的永生起誓，我必照著你們所說給我聽的，對待你們：

en: your dead bodies shall fall in this wilderness, and of all your number, listed in the census from twenty years old and upward, who have grumbled against me,
zh: 你們的屍體必倒在這曠野；你們中間被數點過的，就是按著你們的數目，從二十歲及以上，向我發過怨言的，

en: not one shall come into the land where I swore that I would make you dwell, except Caleb the son of Jephunneh and Joshua the son of Nun.
zh: 都不得進入我起誓給你們居住的那地；只有耶孚尼的兒子迦勒和嫩的兒子約書亞才可以進去。

en: But your little ones, who you said would become a prey, I will bring in, and they shall know the land that you have rejected.
zh: 但是你們的孩子，就是你們所說他們必被擄掠的，我要把他們領進去，他們必得著你們厭棄的那地。

en: But as for you, your dead bodies shall fall in this wilderness.
zh: 至於你們，你們的屍體必倒在這曠野。

en: And your children shall be shepherds in the wilderness forty years and shall suffer for your faithlessness, until the last of your dead bodies lies in the wilderness.
zh: 你們的兒女必在曠野飄流四十年，擔當你們背信之罪，直到你們的屍體在曠野都滅盡了。

en: According to the number of the days in which you spied out the land, forty days, a year for each day, you shall bear your iniquity forty years, and you shall know my displeasure.'
zh: 照著你們窺探那地的日數共四十天，一天算一年，你們要擔當罪孽四十年，你們就知道我為甚麼與你們作對。’

en: I, the LORD, have spoken. Surely this will I do to all this wicked congregation who are gathered together against me: in this wilderness they shall come to a full end, and there they shall die."
zh: 我耶和華已經說了，我必要這樣對待這聚集反抗我的惡會眾；他們要在這曠野滅盡，在這裡死亡。”

en: And the men whom Moses sent to spy out the land, who returned and made all the congregation grumble against him by bringing up a bad report about the land-
zh: 摩西派去窺探那地的人回來，因為帶回有關那地的惡信，以致全體會眾都向摩西發怨言，

en: the men who brought up a bad report of the land- died by plague before the LORD.
zh: 這些帶回有關那地的惡信的人，都遭受瘟疫死在耶和華面前。

en: Of those men who went to spy out the land, only Joshua the son of Nun and Caleb the son of Jephunneh remained alive.
zh: 在那些去窺探那地的人之中，只有嫩的兒子約書亞和耶孚尼的兒子迦勒，仍然活著。

en: When Moses told these words to all the people of Israel, the people mourned greatly.
zh: 摩西把這些話告訴以色列眾人，他們就非常悲哀。

en: And they rose early in the morning and went up to the heights of the hill country, saying, "Here we are. We will go up to the place that the LORD has promised, for we have sinned."
zh: 他們清早起來，上山頂去，說：“我們在這裡；我們要上耶和華應許的地方去，因為我們犯了罪。”

en: But Moses said, "Why now are you transgressing the command of the LORD, when that will not succeed?
zh: 摩西說：“你們為甚麼又違背耶和華的命令呢？這事必不能成功。

en: Do not go up, for the Lord is not among you, lest you be struck down before your enemies.
zh: 你們不要上去，因為耶和華不在你們中間，免得你們在仇敵面前被殺敗。

en: For there the Amalekites and the Canaanites are facing you, and you shall fall by the sword. Because you have turned back from following the LORD, the LORD will not be with you."
zh: 因為亞瑪力人和迦南人都在那裡，在你們面前，你們必倒在刀下；因為你們轉離不跟隨耶和華，耶和華不與你們同在。”

en: But they presumed to go up to the heights of the hill country, although neither the ark of the covenant of the LORD nor Moses departed out of the camp.
zh: 他們卻擅自上山頂去，但是耶和華的約櫃和摩西並沒有離開營地。

en: Then the Amalekites and the Canaanites who lived in that hill country came down and defeated them and pursued them, even to Hormah.
zh: 於是，亞瑪力人和住在那山上的迦南人就下來，擊殺他們，粉碎他們，直到何珥瑪。
